text:
Mukatolini (ムカトリーニ, Mukatorīni) is a skilled lithographer whose works are recognized and valuable. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 10, Chapter 86 

Personality

Not much is known about Mukatolini besides the fact that he only signed the works he "really liked." 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Using Gyo to spot "residual aura", Gon and Killua find one of Mukatolini's limited-edition works (3/50 in its series) at the Bull Market. They buy it for 11,000 after outbidding Zepile and then resell it at a pawn shop for 150,000. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Mukatolini can be considered a Nen genius since it is implied (by analogy with Zepile) that he uses Nen unconsciously to make his works of art more attractive or at least manages to put aura in them. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The only known lithograph appears to suggest that Mukatolini experimented with geometric abstraction or a similar abstract movement.

Anime and Manga Differences

Mukatolini is not mentioned in the 2011 anime adaptation, but his lithography still appears. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 48 (2011)
